calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Oct-22-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-28-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Admissions And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S unopposed Motion To Deem Admissions And Of Nonappearance is granted. Plaintiff's Requests for Admission, Set One, Nos. 1 - 10, date April 23, 2018, ([to be] attached [to the order] as Exhibit A) are each deemed admitted by Defendant Burrill M. Gray pursuant to CCP 2033.280.

Order is signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
